reason: The image depicts a modern office space with a large meeting table, surrounded by people in suits. The presence of smartphones (visible in the hand of the woman in the foreground), plastic water bottles, modern lighting fixtures, modern chairs, and the overall architectural style of the building are anachronistic for any time before the late 20th or early 21st century. The building's construction materials and large glass windows also point to modern construction methods and materials. These elements make the image unsuitable for representing the Danske Bank scandal of 2017 without significant modification.
